one_time_description: Loss on disposal of investments recognized in cash flow statement
economic_notes: Nation holds Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust with investments of $82.4M. Nation has five business enterprises: Sucker Creek Holdings Ltd., Sucker Creek Gas Utility, Sucker Creek First Nation Co-op, SCFN Ventures LP, and SCFN Services LP. Defined contribution pension plan available to substantially all employees.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) asset retirement obligations not estimated or recorded, and (2) insufficient audit evidence on investments in related First Nation entities. SCFN Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust (fully consolidated, Dec 31 fiscal year) holds $82.4M in investments secured by a $34M RBC demand loan. Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + LSLIRC + Government of Alberta + FNDF + CMHC = $24,486,748. OSR = total revenue minus government transfers = $35,153,165 - $24,486,748 = $10,666,417. No schedule of remuneration disclosed in the extracted text. Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust had net loss of $8.37M in calendar year 2022 due to unrealized investment losses of $9.96M.
